# New Assignment Creation Prompt

Use this prompt to guide the creation of a new assignment for the educational portal.

---

## Assignment Title
[Enter a descriptive title for the assignment]

## Objective
[Briefly describe the learning goal and what students will accomplish]

## Tasks
- Task 1: [Describe the first task]
- Task 2: [Describe the second task]
- (Add more tasks as needed)

## Requirements
- [List the requirements for completion]

## Resources
- [List any starter code, data files, or references]

## Student Guidance
- [Encourage students to ask questions and seek help]

---

Refer to the assignment template in templates/assignment-template.md for formatting and structure.
